html:
Exclusive to:  

Fresh Fruit Crepes is a Warly-specific Food Item cooked in the Portable Crock Pot by adding 1.5 units of Fruits, 1 Butter, and 1 Honey. It takes 40 seconds to cook and restores 60 , 150 , and 15 when eaten.

Note that Durian and Dragon Fruit can be freely used when making, as this recipe has higher priority than Monster Lasagna and Dragonpie (However, adding 2 Durians in may result in Monster Tartare instead). Adding 2 Berries will result in Fist Full of Jam instead, due to insufficient Fruit units requirement.

Prerequisites

  • Requires:
  • Requires:
  • Requires:

Recipe

×1.5

Examples

×2

×2

Trivia

  • Fresh Fruit Crepes were added to Don't Starve Together in the Warly Character Update.
  • In C'est La Vie, Wes' animated short, Wes can be seen buying fruit crepes from a nearby store, hence why it is his favorite food.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

Bánh Crepes Trái Cây Tươi là một Loại Thực Phẩm đặc trưng của Warly được nấu trong Nồi Hầm Di Động bằng cách thêm 1,5 đơn vị Trái Cây, 1 Bơ và 1 Mật Ong. Mất 40 giây để nấu và hồi lại 60, 150 và 15 khi ăn.

'''Fresh Fruit Crepes''' is a [[Warly]]-specific [[Food]] [[Item]] cooked in the [[Portable Crock Pot]] by adding 1.5 units of [[Fruits]], 1 [[Butter]], and 1 [[Honey]]. It takes 40 seconds to cook and restores 60 {{Hp}}, 150 {{Hunger}}, and 15 {{Sanity}} when eaten.

Note that [[Durian]] and [[Dragon Fruit]] can be freely used when making, as this recipe has higher priority than [[Monster Lasagna]] and [[Dragonpie]] (However, adding 2 Durians in {{Pic32|Don't Starve Together icon}} may result in [[Monster Tartare]] instead). Adding 2 [[Berries]] will result in [[Fist Full of Jam]] instead, due to insufficient Fruit units requirement.

== Prerequisites ==
* Requires: [[File:Fruits Crock Pot.png|link=Fruits]]
* Requires: [[File:Butter.png|link=Butter]]
* Requires: [[File:Honey.png|link=Honey]]

== [[File:Cookbook.png|32px|link=]] Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Fruit
|count1 = 1.5
|item2 = Butter
|item3 = Honey
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Fresh Fruit Crepes
}}

== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Banana SW
|item2 = Berries
|item3 = Butter
|item4 = Honey
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Fresh Fruit Crepes
}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Durian
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Butter
|item3 = Honey
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Fresh Fruit Crepes
}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Halved Coconut
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Butter
|item3 = Honey
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Fresh Fruit Crepes
|dlc = Shipwrecked
}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Fresh Fruit Crepes were added to ''Don't Starve Together'' in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#July 25, 2019 - Warly Character Update|Warly Character Update]].
*In [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ao61s4M7rtA C'est La Vie], Wes' animated short, Wes can be seen buying fruit crepes from a nearby store, hence why it is his favorite food.
